## Title

Brief description of the issue or feature request.

## Type

- [ ] Bug — Equation/theorem/pattern error
- [ ] Feature — New research area
- [ ] Documentation — Missing or incorrect documentation
- [ ] Enhancement — Improvement to existing content
- [ ] Question — Clarification needed
- [ ] Other

## Area

Which agent area or domain does this affect?

<!-- e.g., Agent 45 (Category Theory), Phase 3, Cross-domain -->

## Description

Detailed description of the issue or feature.

## For Bugs

- **Expected:** What should be true
- **Actual:** What is currently true
- **Evidence:** Equation/theorem/pattern reference

## For Features

- **Proposed:** What should be added
- **Equation range:** E###–E### (if applicable)
- **Pattern range:** P###–P### (if applicable)

## Priority

- [ ] Critical — Blocks further research
- [ ] High — Should be addressed soon
- [ ] Normal — Standard priority
- [ ] Low — Nice to have

## Related

Links to related issues, papers, or equation ranges.
